subject: Motor claim for policy POL-482913
email_body: Hello ClaimIQ team, I am Arjun Mehta. My policy number is POL-482913. My car was damaged in a road accident on 2026-06-10 near Whitefield, Bengaluru. The repair estimate from the garage is INR 185000. The police report is filed and photos plus invoice are attached.

documents_summary.aggregate_summary: Repair invoice and vehicle damage photo were attached.
